headline: With 10,000+ Micro-Scrubbing Dots, The New Swiffer PowerMop Delivers a Deeper, More Satisfying Clean
summary: CINCINNATI, March 17, 2026--The updated Swiffer PowerMop pads make floor cleaning easier by tackling the constant effort and lackluster results that mop and buckets often leave behind. With more scrubbing power and smart new features, the upgraded pads deliver a deeper, stronger clean you can see and feel, and it even passes the white sock test by showing how much dirt other methods miss.

thumbnail.caption: Newly upgraded PowerMop pads feature 10,000+ micro-scrubbing dots

headline: Procter & Gamble Premium Launches Test Loyalty In Baby And Home Care
summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) has introduced Pampers AMORE, described as the most premium and absorbent diaper in the Pampers range. Pampers AMORE is the first new diaper for newborns and toddlers in the Pampers lineup since 2018, with a focus on comfort, protection, and safety standards. P&G has also rolled out significant upgrades to Swiffer PowerMop and Mr. Clean products, with new features aimed at greater convenience and cleaning performance.
